2151810.name: darkwebSTREAMER
2151810.description:
Hauntings. Rituals. A strange internet. And you, an occult streamer, flirting with madness and mutilation as you find out just how far you'll go to please your audience and get internet famous in this psycho-horror narrative roguelite RPG streaming management sim.

:::::: FEATURES ::::::

RPG MANAGEMENT SIM GAMEPLAY. manage your skills, social stats, money, viewers, subscribers, relationships and more as you juggle your stream... and your survival.

UNIQUE PLAYTHROUGHS. encounter countless procedurally generated events, NPCs, webpages, items, entities, histories, stories, rituals, crafting recipes and more! no two playthroughs are ever the same.

EMERGENT NARRATIVES. completely randomised encounters, events, characters, histories and outcomes mean a story which makes itself in response to your actions -- and the actions of people in the world around you.

SURF THE WORLD'S FIRST GENERATED INTERNET. explore a procedurally generated infinite internet, filled with strange individuals, bizarre writings, insidious entities, peculiar marketplaces and a whole host of disturbing knickknacks and webpages to share with your subscribers.

CUTTING-EDGE NPC PSYCHOLOGY. utilising anthropology & linguistic theory, each denizen of the dark web has their own unique procedurally generated vocabularies, speech styles, opinions, backstories, webpages, stats, and more. all NPCs live their own lives alongside yours -- you ain't the only hero of this show. make friends and enemies, improve your relationships or fend off the people you accidentally enraged. it's all part of being on the internet, baby.

GET HAUNTED. while you’re raking in that sweet, sweet streamer cash, watch out for supernatural entities coming along with it. every creepy object you purchase and show off to your stream has a chance to unleash a haunted hell upon your cozy little apartment – no pressure, no pressure.

DO WEIRD RITUALS AND CRAFT WEIRD STUFF. find, purchase or pry occult recipes and rituals from the web to protect yourself from your increasingly contaminated apartment. procedurally generated recipes means no googling what you want - you work for that ish, every time. and it's fresh and interesting, every time.

FORGE YOUR OWN IDENTITY. the internet changes you. fame changes you. being scared as all hell changes you. everything you encounter in darkwebSTREAMER changes you meaningfully and is tracked in your skills, stats, moods, memories and more. every decision influences future decisions and opportunities. who will you be?

TWITCH & STREAMING INTEGRATION. darkwebSTREAMER is designed from the ground up to be one of the most entertaining streaming games of all time. both Twitch and Youtube Live viewers can become NPCs in a real life streamer's game, influencing the streamer's character, world and decisions and participating in in-game streams. meta as f***.

MODDABLE AS HELL. we wanted to make the most moddable game of all time. so we designed our devtools to be modtools -- modders use the same software the dev team does to add content into the game, and easily. so calling not just programmers but artists, writers, and idea-havers - come make your own creepypastas, websites and messed up little stories to experience in the game. then share them with your friends. or enemies. or everyone online.

AND THERE'S MORE...

but that's for you to discover. what are you going to give up on the road to fame?
2151810.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
developers: We Have Always Lived In The Forest
publishers: We Have Always Lived In The Forest
